title.en: Managing Link Aggregation with YANG: Conformance, Data Model, and Annexes
title.zh: 用 YANG 管理链路聚合：一致性、数据模型与附录

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.1AXdz-2025 is Amendment 1 to the Link Aggregation standard. Link Aggregation (LAG) bundles several physical links into one logical link so they share traffic and survive a link failure. This amendment does not invent new bundling behavior — it adds a clean, machine-readable way to *configure and monitor* that behavior using YANG. YANG ("Yet Another Next Generation", IETF RFC 7950) is a data-modeling language: it describes the exact tree of settings and status values a device exposes to network management software. This lesson walks through the conformance hook that requires YANG support (Clause 5), the YANG data model itself (Clause 10), and the two supporting annexes (Annex A and Annex G).
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1AXdz-2025 是链路聚合标准的第 1 号修正案。链路聚合（Link Aggregation，LAG）把多条物理链路捆绑成一条逻辑链路，使它们共享流量并在单链路故障时继续工作。本修正案并没有发明新的捆绑行为——它用 YANG 增加了一种干净、可被机器读取的方式来*配置和监控*这种行为。YANG（“Yet Another Next Generation”，IETF RFC 7950）是一种数据建模语言：它描述设备向网络管理软件暴露的设置项和状态值所构成的精确树形结构。本课讲解要求支持 YANG 的一致性挂钩（第 5 章）、YANG 数据模型本身（第 10 章），以及两个配套附录（附录 A 与附录 G）。

blocks.en: Clause 5 is about conformance — the formal list of what a device must or may do to claim it follows the standard. Subclause 5.3.2 (Link Aggregation options) gains two new list items: item j) requires supporting YANG modules for managing Link Aggregation capabilities, and item k) requires supporting YANG modules for managing DRNI capabilities. DRNI (Distributed Resilient Network Interface) lets two cooperating systems present a single LAG to a partner, so a whole box can fail without dropping the aggregated link. Both new options point at Clause 10 as the place that defines the actual modules.
blocks.zh: 第 5 章关于一致性——即设备要声称遵循标准时必须或可以做到的事情的正式清单。子条款 5.3.2（链路聚合选项）新增了两个列表项：j) 项要求支持用于管理链路聚合能力的 YANG 模块，k) 项要求支持用于管理 DRNI 能力的 YANG 模块。DRNI（Distributed Resilient Network Interface，分布式弹性网络接口）让两个协作的系统对外呈现为一条 LAG，从而整台设备故障也不会中断聚合链路。这两个新选项都指向第 10 章，那里定义了真正的模块。

blocks.en: Clause 10 (the new YANG data model) is the heart of the amendment. It opens (10.1, YANG framework) by explaining the hierarchy YANG uses: a uniform resource name (URN) namespace assigned per IEEE Std 802, and a tree of configuration and operational data nodes. Then 10.2 (Information model for Link Aggregation management) presents the design as UML-like (Unified Modeling Language-like) pictures. In those pictures a gray box is something this IEEE standard defines, and a white box comes from somewhere else (such as IETF interface management). The information model splits into two parts: 10.2.1 the Link Aggregation model and 10.2.2 the DRNI model.
blocks.zh: 第 10 章（新增的 YANG 数据模型）是本修正案的核心。它的开头（10.1，YANG 框架）解释了 YANG 采用的层次结构：按 IEEE Std 802 分配的统一资源名称（URN）命名空间，以及由配置数据节点和运行数据节点组成的树。随后 10.2（链路聚合管理的信息模型）用类 UML（类 Unified Modeling Language，统一建模语言）的图来展示设计。在这些图中，灰色框表示本 IEEE 标准所定义的内容，白色框来自别处（例如 IETF 接口管理）。该信息模型分为两部分：10.2.1 链路聚合模型与 10.2.2 DRNI 模型。

blocks.en: The Link Aggregation model (10.2.1) is organized around a "key group": the set of Aggregators and Aggregation Ports that share the same System Priority, System MAC Address, and Aggregation Key, and therefore can potentially form one Link Aggregation Group. Each Aggregation Port is a normal interface (for example ethernetCsmacd) augmented with an "aggport" container; each Aggregator is an interface to the whole group augmented with a "lag" container. The Link Aggregation Control Protocol (LACP) dynamically binds ports to aggregators. The DRNI model (10.2.2) augments an Aggregator with a "drni" container holding the parameters that two cooperating systems use to behave as one — managed by the Distributed Relay Control Protocol (DRCP).
blocks.zh: 链路聚合模型（10.2.1）围绕“密钥组（key group）”组织：即共享相同系统优先级（System Priority）、系统 MAC 地址（System MAC Address）和聚合密钥（Aggregation Key）、因而可能组成一个链路聚合组的那组聚合器（Aggregator）和聚合端口（Aggregation Port）。每个聚合端口是一个普通接口（例如 ethernetCsmacd）并附加一个“aggport”容器；每个聚合器是通往整个组的接口并附加一个“lag”容器。链路聚合控制协议（Link Aggregation Control Protocol，LACP）动态地把端口绑定到聚合器。DRNI 模型（10.2.2）在聚合器上附加一个“drni”容器，存放两个协作系统“合为一体”所用的参数——由分布式中继控制协议（Distributed Relay Control Protocol，DRCP）管理。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="170" y="10" width="120" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="30" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">IETF interface mgmt</text><line x1="230" y1="40" x2="230" y2="60"/><rect x="30" y="60" width="120" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="90" y="81" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">linkagg / key-group</text><rect x="170" y="60" width="120" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="81" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">lag (Aggregator)</text><rect x="310" y="60" width="120" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="370" y="81" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">aggport (Port)</text><line x1="230" y1="94" x2="230" y2="120"/><rect x="170" y="120" width="120" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="141" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">drni container</text><line x1="230" y1="154" x2="230" y2="180"/><rect x="150" y="180" width="160" height="30" rx="4" stroke-dasharray="5 3"/><text x="230" y="200" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">3 YANG modules (10.3)</text></svg>

caption.en: The YANG root hierarchy: IETF interfaces are augmented with lag, aggport, and drni containers, all realized by three IEEE 802.1AX YANG modules.
caption.zh: YANG 根层次结构：IETF 接口被附加 lag、aggport 和 drni 容器，全部由三个 IEEE 802.1AX YANG 模块实现。

blocks.en: Subclause 10.3 (Structure of the YANG data model) states the model is realized as three modules: ieee802-dot1ax-types (shared data types), ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg (Link Aggregation management), and ieee802-dot1ax-drni (DRNI management). It also gives a precedence rule: if the description text inside a YANG module ever disagrees with the rest of the standard, the rest of the standard wins. Subclause 10.4 (Relationship to other YANG modules) lists what these modules import: 10.4.1 the IEEE 802.1AX Types module (reusable AX types), 10.4.2 the IETF YANG Types module (RFC 6991 — used for counter64), 10.4.3 the IETF Interfaces module (RFC 8343 — the interface tree being augmented), and 10.4.4 the IEEE 802 Types module (shared 802 types such as mac-address).
blocks.zh: 子条款 10.3（YANG 数据模型的结构）说明该模型由三个模块实现：ieee802-dot1ax-types（共享数据类型）、ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg（链路聚合管理）和 ieee802-dot1ax-drni（DRNI 管理）。它还给出一条优先级规则：若 YANG 模块内的描述文本与标准其余部分有出入，以标准其余部分为准。子条款 10.4（与其他 YANG 模块的关系）列出这些模块所导入的内容：10.4.1 IEEE 802.1AX 类型模块（可复用的 AX 类型）、10.4.2 IETF YANG 类型模块（RFC 6991——用于 counter64）、10.4.3 IETF 接口模块（RFC 8343——被增补的接口树）、10.4.4 IEEE 802 类型模块（共享的 802 类型，如 mac-address）。

blocks.en: "Augment" is the key YANG verb here. Instead of redefining what an interface is, IEEE 802.1AX reuses the IETF interface tree (RFC 8343) and *augments* it: an Aggregation Port interface gains an aggport container, an Aggregator interface gains lag and drni containers. This keeps Link Aggregation management interoperable with everything else that already manages interfaces.
blocks.zh: “augment（增补）”是这里的关键 YANG 动词。IEEE 802.1AX 不重新定义接口是什么，而是复用 IETF 接口树（RFC 8343）并对其*增补*：聚合端口接口获得 aggport 容器，聚合器接口获得 lag 和 drni 容器。这样链路聚合管理就能与其它已在管理接口的一切保持互操作。

blocks.en: Subclause 10.5 (Security considerations) reminds implementers that these YANG modules are meant to be reached over a network configuration protocol such as NETCONF (RFC 6241), whose secure transport is SSH and whose access-control model restricts who may read or write each data node. Subclause 10.5.1 (Security considerations of the ieee802-dot1ax modules) names the specific writable containers — such as linkagg/key-group, its cscd maps, aggport, lag, and drni/home-gateway-conv-service-map — that an attacker could tamper with to disrupt LACP or DRCP, and notes that even readable data (system names, remote-system info) can leak topology and so should be access-controlled.
blocks.zh: 子条款 10.5（安全考虑）提醒实现者：这些 YANG 模块应通过网络配置协议（如 NETCONF，RFC 6241）访问，其安全传输为 SSH，其访问控制模型限制谁可以读写每个数据节点。子条款 10.5.1（ieee802-dot1ax 模块的安全考虑）列出了具体的可写容器——如 linkagg/key-group 及其 cscd 映射、aggport、lag、以及 drni/home-gateway-conv-service-map——攻击者可篡改它们以扰乱 LACP 或 DRCP，并指出即便是可读数据（系统名、远端系统信息）也可能泄露拓扑，因此应施加访问控制。

blocks.en: Subclause 10.6 (YANG schema tree definitions) shows the model as compact "tree" diagrams. Read the symbols this way: rw = configuration (read-write), ro = state (read-only), [name] = list key, ? = optional node, ! = presence container, * = a list or leaf-list, and parentheses mark choices. 10.6.1 is the tree for ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg (linkagg → agg-system, key-group with its cscd conversation maps, plus the lag/aggport augments and lag-stats counters). 10.6.2 is the tree for ieee802-dot1ax-drni (the drni container with gateway masks and a neighbor subtree). Finally 10.7 (YANG modules) contains the full module source: 10.7.1 ieee802-dot1ax-types (features like cscd, dwc, sid-map and the shared typedefs), 10.7.2 ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg, and 10.7.3 ieee802-dot1ax-drni.
blocks.zh: 子条款 10.6（YANG 模式树定义）以紧凑的“树”图展示模型。符号读法如下：rw = 配置（读写），ro = 状态（只读），[name] = 列表键，? = 可选节点，! = 存在容器，* = 列表或叶列表，括号标示选择项。10.6.1 是 ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg 的树（linkagg → agg-system、key-group 及其 cscd 会话映射，外加 lag/aggport 增补和 lag-stats 计数器）。10.6.2 是 ieee802-dot1ax-drni 的树（带网关掩码的 drni 容器以及 neighbor 子树）。最后 10.7（YANG 模块）包含完整的模块源码：10.7.1 ieee802-dot1ax-types（cscd、dwc、sid-map 等 feature 及共享 typedef）、10.7.2 ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg、10.7.3 ieee802-dot1ax-drni。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[5.3.2 conformance: must support YANG] --> B[10.1 framework + 10.2 info model]
  B --> C[10.3 three modules]
  C --> D[10.4 imported modules]
  C --> E[10.6 schema trees]
  E --> F[10.7 full module source]
  C --> G[10.5 security: NETCONF over SSH]
  C --> H[Annex A PICS proforma]
  C --> I[Annex G bibliography]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[5.3.2 一致性：必须支持 YANG] --> B[10.1 框架 + 10.2 信息模型]
  B --> C[10.3 三个模块]
  C --> D[10.4 导入的模块]
  C --> E[10.6 模式树]
  E --> F[10.7 完整模块源码]
  C --> G[10.5 安全：基于 SSH 的 NETCONF]
  C --> H[附录 A PICS 模板]
  C --> I[附录 G 参考文献]

blocks.en: The annexes close the loop. Annex A (normative) is the Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement (PICS) proforma — a checklist a vendor fills in to declare what it actually supports. This amendment inserts two new rows into table A.2.1: a "YANG" row (optional, O — does the device support management via YANG, per 10.6) and a "YANG modules" row that makes each module mandatory once YANG is claimed (types and linkagg are YANG:M, and the drni module is mandatory when both DRNI and YANG are supported). Annex G (informative) is the Bibliography; this amendment adds three references after [B8]: RFC 7803 (NETCONF capability URNs registry), RFC 8040 (RESTCONF Protocol), and OMG UML version 2.5 — the modeling notation behind the 10.2 diagrams.
blocks.zh: 两个附录收尾。附录 A（规范性）是协议实现一致性声明（Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement，PICS）模板——供应商填写以声明自己实际支持的内容的清单。本修正案在表 A.2.1 中插入两行：一行“YANG”（可选，O——设备是否按 10.6 支持通过 YANG 管理），以及一行“YANG modules”，一旦声称支持 YANG，各模块即为强制（types 与 linkagg 为 YANG:M，drni 模块在同时支持 DRNI 与 YANG 时为强制）。附录 G（资料性）是参考文献；本修正案在 [B8] 之后新增三条：RFC 7803（NETCONF 能力 URN 注册表）、RFC 8040（RESTCONF 协议）和 OMG UML 2.5 版——即 10.2 各图所用的建模记法。

summary.zh: 覆盖地图——精确条款编号

blocks.en: Clause 5 (Conformance): 5.3.2 Link Aggregation options — adds items j) (YANG for Link Aggregation) and k) (YANG for DRNI), both pointing to Clause 10 (p.17). Clause 10 (YANG data model): 10.1 YANG framework — URN namespace + config/operational data hierarchy (p.18); 10.2.1 Link Aggregation model — key groups, aggport/lag containers, LACP binding (pp.18-20); 10.2.2 DRNI model — drni container, DRCP, neighbor info (p.21); 10.3 Structure — three modules + precedence rule, Table 10-1 (p.22); 10.4.1 IEEE 802.1AX Types module, 10.4.2 IETF YANG Types (RFC 6991, counter64), 10.4.3 IETF Interfaces (RFC 8343, augmented), 10.4.4 IEEE 802 Types (mac-address) (p.22); 10.5.1 security of the ieee802-dot1ax modules — sensitive writable containers, NETCONF/SSH (p.23); 10.6.1 schema tree for ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg, 10.6.2 schema tree for ieee802-dot1ax-drni (pp.24-26); 10.7.1 ieee802-dot1ax-types module (features cscd/dwc/sid-map), 10.7.2 ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg module, 10.7.3 ieee802-dot1ax-drni module (pp.26-27 onward). Annex A (normative) PICS proforma — new A.2.1 rows: YANG (O) and YANG modules (YANG:M / DRNI AND YANG:M) (p.56). Annex G (informative) Bibliography — adds RFC 7803, RFC 8040 (RESTCONF), OMG UML 2.5 as [B9]-[B11] (p.57).
blocks.zh: 第 5 章（一致性）：5.3.2 链路聚合选项——新增 j) 项（链路聚合的 YANG）与 k) 项（DRNI 的 YANG），均指向第 10 章（第 17 页）。第 10 章（YANG 数据模型）：10.1 YANG 框架——URN 命名空间 + 配置/运行数据层次（第 18 页）；10.2.1 链路聚合模型——密钥组、aggport/lag 容器、LACP 绑定（第 18-20 页）；10.2.2 DRNI 模型——drni 容器、DRCP、neighbor 信息（第 21 页）；10.3 结构——三个模块 + 优先级规则、表 10-1（第 22 页）；10.4.1 IEEE 802.1AX 类型模块、10.4.2 IETF YANG 类型（RFC 6991，counter64）、10.4.3 IETF 接口（RFC 8343，被增补）、10.4.4 IEEE 802 类型（mac-address）（第 22 页）；10.5.1 ieee802-dot1ax 模块的安全——敏感的可写容器、NETCONF/SSH（第 23 页）；10.6.1 ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg 模式树、10.6.2 ieee802-dot1ax-drni 模式树（第 24-26 页）；10.7.1 ieee802-dot1ax-types 模块（feature cscd/dwc/sid-map）、10.7.2 ieee802-dot1ax-linkagg 模块、10.7.3 ieee802-dot1ax-drni 模块（第 26-27 页起）。附录 A（规范性）PICS 模板——新增 A.2.1 行：YANG（O）与 YANG modules（YANG:M / DRNI AND YANG:M）（第 56 页）。附录 G（资料性）参考文献——新增 RFC 7803、RFC 8040（RESTCONF）、OMG UML 2.5，编号 [B9]-[B11]（第 57 页）。

cites.note: Clause 5.3.2 adds list items j) and k) requiring YANG support for Link Aggregation and DRNI.
Clause 10.1 YANG framework; 10.2.1 Link Aggregation model (key groups, aggport/lag); 10.2.2 DRNI model.
10.3 three-module structure + Table 10-1; 10.4.1-10.4.4 imported modules; 10.5 / 10.5.1 security considerations.
10.6.1/10.6.2 schema trees; 10.7.1 types module features; start of 10.7.2/10.7.3 module source.
Annex A PICS proforma rows (YANG, YANG modules); Annex G bibliography additions [B9]-[B11].
